overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a futuristic flying vehicle in Cyberpunk 2077, traversing the desert Badlands at high velocity. The vehicle flies along a highway past power infrastructure, passes over a sprawling shantytown settlement, then continues over open desert toward the distant city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with power transmission infrastructure

events.description: passing a gas station with signage on the right side of the highway
leaving the paved highway and approaching the shantytown settlement

agents.ego_description: piloting a futuristic flying vehicle along the desert highway at high speed, maintaining low altitude

entered.detail: sleek white and red interior with holographic dashboard display showing speed and navigation
two-lane paved road stretching through the arid landscape
tall metal lattice towers with high-voltage lines running parallel to the road
hazy mountain range forming the horizon backdrop
roadside fuel station with canopy and signage visible on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic flying vehicle cockpit, speeding along a desert highway. Power transmission towers line the left side while distant mountains frame the horizon. The vehicle passes a roadside gas station around the 10-second mark, then begins to leave the highway behind as a shantytown settlement comes into view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: sprawling desert shantytown with dense makeshift structures

events.description: beginning overflight of the shantytown settlement, ground changes from highway to dirt
slight banking adjustment while navigating over the densest cluster of buildings

agents.ego_description: flying low over the shantytown, navigating above the dense cluster of makeshift buildings and scattered ground vehicles

entered.detail: dense collection of improvised structures and makeshift housing spread across the desert floor
small improvised shelters and shacks viewed from above

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions from highway flight to low-altitude overflight of a sprawling shantytown settlement. The camera reveals a dense cluster of makeshift buildings and improvised housing spread across the desert badlands. The vehicle maintains steady forward motion while banking slightly to navigate over the settlement's dense center.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert badlands with distant urban skyline

events.description: exiting the shantytown and returning to open desert terrain
distant city skyline becomes more prominent on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: flying over open desert terrain toward the distant city skyline, maintaining high altitude

entered.detail: futuristic urban towers and skyscrapers visible on the distant horizon
large rock formations and boulders scattered across the desert floor

segments.scene_description: Leaving the shantytown behind, the vehicle flies over open desert badlands with rocky outcrops and sparse vegetation. The distant skyline of Night City becomes increasingly visible on the left horizon, with towering skyscrapers contrasting against the barren landscape. The vehicle continues its high-speed journey toward the urban center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a futuristic cockpit as it transitions from a high-speed highway flight into a low-altitude sweep over a desert settlement. It begins speeding along a desert road, passing power transmission towers and a roadside gas station with distant mountains framing the horizon. As the vehicle leaves the highway behind, the open terrain shifts into the outskirts of a sprawling shantytown. The scene then expands to reveal a dense cluster of makeshift buildings and improvised housing spread across the badlands. Finally, the camera maintains steady forward motion, banking slightly to navigate directly over the settlement's crowded center.

The shot follows a continuous high-speed flight that transitions from the outskirts of a rural settlement into the vast expanse of the desert badlands. It begins by leaving a shantytown behind, gliding over a barren terrain defined by rocky outcrops and sparse vegetation. As the vehicle maintains its velocity, the horizon gradually opens up to reveal the distant skyline of Night City. The scene then shifts in scale as the towering skyscrapers on the left become increasingly prominent, creating a sharp contrast against the desolate landscape before the camera continues its steady trajectory toward the urban center.
